name: Cry Me A River of Stars
overview: Story of a new magistrate, Tao Junran and A Fan, owner of a painting boat. Tao Junran wants to get close to the painting boat to investigate a old case, while A Fan wants to curry favors with the magistrate. Each harboring their own intentions, they begin to get close to each other unknowingly.

trailers.title: Official Trailer: Cry Me A River of Stars | 春来枕星河 | iQiyi
